posts.text:
“When she announced Tim Walz…I showed up in Philly that night. I announced them to my hometown crowd, and I campaigned all across the country for the two of them and worked my tail off to help them get elected.” — Gov. Josh Shapiro on supporting Kamala Harris and Tim Walz

Video

“Just because I disagree with Benjamin Netanyahu doesn't make me an antisemite, in as much as because I disagree with Donald Trump, doesn't make me any less of an American patriot." — Gov. Josh Shapiro

Video

“Pete Hegseth is wildly incompetent. He’s like an eight year old playing with toy soldiers every day.” — Gov. Josh Shapiro

Video

The DOGE-bags's deposition reveals a lot. Credit to @404mediaco for finding the clip.

Video

Is the SAVE America Act doomed to fail?

Video

Let's hope Joe Rogan can bring this energy into the 2028 election.

Video

Did Trump stumble ass backward into World War III?

Video

"Asking the hard questions is the most patriotic thing to do because [the] troops, trust us." –Representative Pat Ryan

Video

The right thing to do here is to oppose funding Trump’s war in Iran.

Video

Tommy Vietor’s message to Democrats: If you oppose the war in Iran, you have to oppose funding it.

Video

Jon, Jon and Tommy react to Fox News issuing a rare apology for playing clearly old footage of Trump at a dignified transfer ceremony.

Video

"What we’re dealing with is madness." –Jon Lovett on Trump's war in Iran.

Video

Trump says that the war in Iran is over, but vows to keep fighting.

Video

Jon Favreau isn't giving up his Dunkin'.

Video

The cult of Donald Trump is so deep that they can only view the death of U.S. service members as a negative story for Trump.

Video

It’s just the idea that we are going to bomb and kill these people into submission, and that is going to create a peaceful Middle East is just f*cking insane and not borne out by any evidence throughout any of history." –Jon Favreau

Video

The Trump administration has no plan for the war that they just started.

Video

Trump has ousted Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary.

#podsaveamerica #crookedmedia #kristinoem #trump
